name: Plain Rice Pilaf - Armenian (Printz Pilaf)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan or casserole, melt the butter over moderate heat.
2. Add the rice and cook for 2 minutes until grains are thoroughly coated with butter but not browned, stirring constantly.
3. Pour in the broth (stock) and sprinkle with salt. Bring to a boil, stirring.
4. Reduce the heat to low. Cover and simmer for about 20 minutes or until all the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender, still firm to the bite— not mushy.
5. Gently fluff the rice with a fork.
6. Spoon onto a heated serving platter, being careful not to mash it.
